title: Prologue - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
### Prologue Part A: November 29

* * *

Start a new game and select the game's difficulty level. If you plan on getting the Platinum trophy, you will need at least two playthroughs. If you have a save data from Trails of Cold Steel, you can transfer your save file over. This will let you start a new game with some extra bonuses.

| Difficulty | Description | Stats |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Easy | Balanced for quick, easy battles. Ideal for beginners and story enthusiast. | Enemies are at 0.70 of their stats. |
| Normal | Build around satisfyingly tough combat. Aimed to people used to playing RPG. | Enemies are at 1.00 of their stats. |
| Hard | Battles will take everything you have. For skilled players who find Normal too easy. | Enemies are at 1.15 of their stats. |
| Nightmare | Balanced for New Game+. Ideal for replays. | Enemies are at 1.30 of their stats. |

\- Advertisement -

| Rean's Level | Bonus |
| --- | --- |
| Level 69 or lower. | Sepith x 100 (All Colors), Attack 1, Zeram Powder |
| Level 70 - 79 | Sepith x 300 (All Colors), Attack 1, Soul Blur, Zeram Powder |
| Level 80 or higher. | Sepith x 500 (All Colors), Attack 1, Soul Blur, Saintly Force, Zeram Powder |
| Rean's Rank | Bonus | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| A0 | Golden Emblem | HP +1000, EP +100, STR /DEF /ATS /ADF +10 |
| A1 | Silver Emblem | HP +500, EP +50 |

Watch the introduction sequence, if you haven't beaten the original Trails of Cold Steel, this part will give you a summary of the ending of the original game, so beware of the spoilers you are about to see. After the intro sequences is over, you will get to control [Rean](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Rean "walkthrough").

[![Trails of cold steel ii controls vita.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/6/62/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_vita.jpg/320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_vita.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_vita.jpg) [![Trails of cold steel ii controls ps3.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/c/cd/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_ps3.jpg/320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_ps3.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_controls_ps3.jpg)

Enemy information in this guide is based on Normal mode circumstances. As you claim control, the game will let you know about **saving**. This is done by going to the menu and using the **Save** option. You can also access the **Cross-Save feature**, which lets you upload your save data to PSN. This is for players to transfer save files between the PS3 or Vita.

If you ever get lost, pressing the **Square** button will open the Navigation menu, it will also highlight your next objective on the bottom right of the screen.

Head downhill, you will notice a shining object. Examine it to receive Rean's equipment. The game will let you know about the [Orbment](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Orbment "walkthrough") system. Go to the menu and equip your Master quartz under the Orbment section. Now run down the hill, you will see a monster, by touching it, you will engage in battle. If you manage to sneak up on a monster, or stun it with your field attack, (Pressing the Confirm button, **X or O in Japanese version**) you will get an additional [advantage](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Advantage "walkthrough") during battle. The bonus includes extra turns and reduced enemy HP. After you have defeated the monster in combat, the game will let you know about Monster Notes. Each time you defeated a monster, additional data is filled in regarding to enemies you have previously fought. If you want to fill in this information immediately you need to use the **Battle Scope** item, a quartz with the spell **"Analyze"** or **Emma and Eliot's Detector ability**. Now just keep going east to see another event. Then further down you will fight a rock type creature. The game will prompt you into the basics of Arts. This monster has a high physical defense, so use the Fire Bolt spell to quickly defeat the monster. Now further down the hill, Rean will notice an Orbment Charging Station, examine it to fully restore your character's HP and EP. Now enter the next area to Eisengard Mountains 2.

**Eisengard Range**

Head down the hill to find a treasure chest that contains a **Tear** quartz. Go a little further, Rean will notice it's a strong type of monster. Fight it, the game will let you know about using the S-Craft function. S-Crafts are super attacks that require a 100-200 CP to perform, found under the Craft section. It can also be used by pressing [![PSTRIANGLE.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/a/a7/PSTRIANGLE.png/20px-PSTRIANGLE.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:PSTRIANGLE.png) **Triangle** when it's not your turn, although using it this way adds a lot more delay to your turn.

When you have defeated the monster, head to the south corner of the map to find a **Teara Balm**. Then go to the east area for an event scene. Then head to the northeast corner of the map to find a **Proxy Puppet** in the treasure box. Then take the southeast exit to Eisengard Mountain 3. Pick up the **Celestial Balm** at the treasure box just directly south and then go all the way to the south end to find an Orbment Charging Station. Heal yourself and go to the southeast end to fight a boss battle.

**Note:** Maps in this guide are designed with the compass facing north.

[![Trails of cold steel ii eisengard range.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/b/be/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_eisengard_range.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_eisengard_range.png)

| Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Helm Scorpion | Chitinous Shell | Hearty Powder |
| Sneaking Frog | Tear Balm | White Beast Flesh |
| Rolling Stone | Tear Balm | U-Material |
| Sky Gazer | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
|  |
| --- |
| # | Type | Item Name | Location |
| 1/239 | Quartz | Tear | Eisengard Range 2 |
| 2/239 | Healing Item | Teara Balm |
| 3/239 | Accessory | Proxy Puppet |
| 4/239 | Healing Item | Celestial Balm | Eisengard Range 3 |
|  |
| --- |
| Magic Knight Ortheim | HP: 33768 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★★☆ Thrust: ★★★☆ Pierce: ★★★☆ Strike:★★★☆ |
| The first boss battle will be pretty basic. All the boss does is it attacks with its sword. Use Flame Strike to hurt the boss, this ability has a chance to inflict Burn, this will help you expedite his demise. Heal when Rean is under 3000 HP with either Tear or Teara Balm. If the boss gets 2 turns in a row, use a Teara Balm immediately. As soon as you've brought it under 15000 HP the battle will end. |

### Prologue Part B: November 30

* * *

#### **Ymir**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ymir.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/33/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir.jpg)

Watch the event scene, you will be introduced to Elise, Alfin and Toval again. Afterwards, leave the building, the game will let you know about events. story events are marked with a **red exclamation mark** and a **green exclamation mark** for side events. Then go to the general store "Plover" located at the southwest corner of Ymir. Purchase the **Imperial Chronicle Issue #1** and **Gambler Jack Reprint Chapter 1** (There is a trophy for collecting all books found in the game).

Now visit all the red exclamation mark areas marked on the map.

*   **Rean's Parents (Lucia and Baron Schwarzer) at the Baron's Mansion**
*   **Elise and Celine at the Footbath**  
    (This will add the friends note on the menu. Speaking to characters at the right moment will add a page to their profiles, collect them all for a bronze trophy.)
*   **Toval at the Inn & Pub "Valley Echo"** (You can also speak to pub owner, Gerald for some pancakes.)
*   **Werner at the kitchen area, of the Hotel "The Phoenix Wings" (Northeast on map)**  
    (This will add the recipe section to the menu and a new recipe.)
*   **Princess Alfin at the Septian Church**
*   **Annabelle at Ymir Canyon**  
    (Annabelle will give you a fishing rod and the fishing section will be added to the menu. If you have a save data from the original Cold Steel, Annabelle will give you some Groundbait depending on your fishing rank. You can also speak to Annabelle to exchange prizes)

When your done doing all the activities listed above. Go to the **Phoenix Wing** hotel and speak to the receptionist, **Baggins** and then go to **Hot Springs** on right side of the building. Entering the Hot Spring will automatically advance the story, so finished everything you need to do before going in. Afterwards, Elise and Toval will join your party. Go back inside the **Baron Mansion** and speak to **Alfin** for a short event scene. You can also use the footbath at the center of town to fully restore your party, including CP as well. When you are all ready to go, head to the northwest exit to go to Ymir Canyon.

| Fresh Nightmare Mode Recommendations |
| --- |
| Before advancing in this area, it's recommended to stock up on Teara and Reviving Balms. To fund this, you can cook Salty Onigiri with Elise to create Tri-Colored Onigiri (Superb result) and then sell them for 150 Mira each. You should aim to have at least 15 to 20 of each. Additionally, ensure that all three characters are equipped with the best accessory available from the store, which boosts Strength, ATS, and Speed. Finally, invest in EP Charges with any remaining funds. |

#### **Ymir Canyon**

Watch the event scene, when you the first monster, the game will let you know about [Link attacks](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough#Combat_Links "walkthrough"). Hitting enemies with the right attack type can cause an enemy to unbalance which will lead to Link attack for bonus damage. Now finish off the first monster and continue on. Go to the northeast end to find a treasure chest that contains the Lighter accessory. Continue on through the path northwest, if you reach to the northwest end, you will find a monster chest that contains a **Zeram Powder**. You can use Toval's S-Craft on kill all eight enemies at once to get the **Pieces of Eight** trophy. Then go back south and cross the bridge to the east, pick up the **U-Material** in the chest located at the east end. Then head to the north exit to **Ymir Canyon 2**.

Pick up the **Tearal Balm** on your way north, then take the northwest path, eventually the path will split, by going south you can find a **Poison** Quartz in the treasure box. Then go north, all the way to end. You will find another chest with some **Sepith** and just a little further will be an Orbment Charging Station. Heal up and enter the next area for a boss fight.

[![Trails of cold steel ii ymir canyon.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/0/08/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir_canyon.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ymir_canyon.png)

| Name | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Frozen Fungus | Clear Gelatin | Hearty Powder |
| Snow Wisp | Warmer | EP Charge I |
| Snow Flying Feline | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Nix Cyron | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
| Frost Biter | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
|  |
| --- |
| # | Type | Item Name | Location |
| 5/239 | Accessory | Lighter | Ymir Canyon 1 |
| 6/239 | Healing Item | Zeram Powder |
| 7/239 | Other | U-Material x3 |
| 8/239 | Healing Item | Tearal Balm | Ymir Canyon 2 |
| 9/239 | Quartz | Poison |
| 10/239 | Sepith | All Sepith x50 |
|  |
| --- |
| Magic Knight Ortheim | HP: 45225 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★☆☆ Thrust: ★★☆☆ Pierce: ★★☆☆ Strike:★★☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Sword Slash. Hits everyone in front.Ground stab. Targets area around boss (L).Boost. Grants boss Str 50% Up (Red) and cures 15000 HP (normal). |
| Ortheim seems to have an massive upgrade compared to the previous encounter. Ortheim has an area attack move which can hit pretty hard. The most annoying thing about this fight is when Ortheim buff itself, this will raise its attack power and restore 20% of it's HP and will prolong the fight. Use Elise as your main healer, she can use her Holy Squall which restore 60% of your HP within a small radius or the Tear spell. Have Rean and Toval as your main attackers, since you don't have any useful arts at the moment, rely on physical attacks and use your S-Craft on turns with a critical bonus. |
|  |
| --- |
| Magic Knight Ortheim (Phase 2) | HP: 84400 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Idle Stance | Body: ★★★☆ Head: ★★★★ Arms: ★☆☆☆ |
| Attack Stance | Body: ★★☆☆ Head: ★☆☆☆ Arms: ★★★★ |
| You will be using the Ashen Knight, Valimar for this battle. Mech combat is like playing a game of rock-paper-scissors. You need to select a body part and hit. Attacking the correct part will land a critical hit which allows you to perform a Link Attack. Link Attacks provide damage bonus, making them the optimal method to win. Use the picture below as a reference on which part to attack. There isn't much strategy to this battle, just attack it's head during it's idle stance, and it's arms during it's attack stance. |
